features: COOLING & SOOTHING: Pestshield Cooling and Soothing Cream offers fast acting relief from irritation anywhere on the skin; offering convenience and easy use

FAST COOLING ACTION: Pestshield Cooling and Soothing Cream is a great way to calm tenderness on the body quickly and easily; our formula contains tea tree oil which supports in soothing irritated and tender skin
PERFECT FOR TRAVEL: Pestshield Cooling and Soothing Cream is in a small compact tube making is easy to bring along on family travels, outdoor activities, picnics and camping
HOW TO USE: Apply to desired areas of skin as needed; when applying to face squeeze a small amount into hands and apply evenly, taking care to avoid eyes and mouth; repeat if required
Do not use on sensitive areas; do not use on chapped or broken skin
description: Product Description Pestshield Cooling and Soothing Cream offers fast acting relief from irritation anywhere on the skin. Offering convenience and easy use! Pestshield Cooling and Soothing Cream is a great way to calm tenderness on the body quickly and easily. Our formula contains tea tree oil which supports in soothing irritated and tender skin. Pestshield Cooling and Soothing Cream is in a small compact tube making is easy to bring along on family travels, outdoor activities, picnics and camping! Apply to desired areas of skin as needed. When applying to face squeeze a small amount into hands and apply evenly, taking care to avoid eyes and mouth. Repeat if required. Do not use on sensitive areas. Do not use on chapped or broken skin. Directions Please read all product packaging literature and product labels before use.
